text.title: Cache Stampede Prevention (Distributed Lock, Probabilistic Refresh, Coalescing) Core Rules
text.summary: 7 testable rules every Cache Stampede Prevention (Distributed Lock, Probabilistic Refresh, Coalescing) application MUST enforce. HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Distributed lock MUST use `SET key value NX EX <ttl>` — lock TTL > expected rebuild time.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Redis docs + redlock note. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Lock value MUST be a UUID per process; release MUST be conditional `IF current_value == my_token`.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Lock-correctness analyses. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: For hot keys, implement XFetch probabilistic early refresh `rand() < β·delta·log(rand())`.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Vakili 2015 — XFetch paper. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Within a single process, an in-flight map MUST dedup concurrent same-key origin calls.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Go singleflight / Python aiomisc patterns. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Every cache TTL MUST add ±10% jitter to prevent synchronised expiry of correlated keys.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: SRE workbook. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Waiters MUST have a timeout shorter than user-perceived SLO; on timeout serve stale + log.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Field guides. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Always return stale value to waiters while rebuilder repopulates — never return error.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Field guides. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

section.title: Conclusion targets used by the decision tree

rule.statement: Run the full procedure; emit an artefact passing the output contract.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions hold and no duplicate exists.

rule.statement: Skip; surface the missing precondition; do not synthesize.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions fail.

rule.statement: Update the existing artefact in place (bump version, refresh last_reviewed).
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when a duplicate is found.
